fields.label: Title
fields.name: title
fields.default_value: Help others access smarter water trading solutions - and earn rewards while you do it.

fields.label: Description
fields.name: description
fields.default_value: Our Referral Partnership Program is designed for brokers, consultants, service providers, and community leaders who want to connect their network to a trusted, real-time water exchange platform. As a partner, you’ll receive everything you need to promote the TB Water Exchange with confidence and ease — plus earn commission on every successful trade you refer.
